# append(valuesByColumn:)

**Instance Method**

Adds a dictionary’s values as a row to the data frame.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func append(valuesByColumn dictionary: [String : Any?])
```

## Parameters

- **dictionary**: A dictionary of values whose key is a column’s name. Each key in the dictionary must be the name or alias of a column in the data frame. Each value in the dictionary must be of the same types as the corresponding column.

## Adding a Row

- **appendEmptyRow()**: Adds an empty row to the data frame.
- **append(row:)**: Adds a comma-separated, or variadic, list of values as a row to the data frame.

items.description: Adds an empty row to the data frame.
items.name: appendEmptyRow()

items.description: Adds a comma-separated, or variadic, list of values as a row to the data frame.
